author: codex

patch.value: Align to latest published @unbrained/pm-cli, align pm-changelog where applicable, verify changelog/release commands, run tests with real package data, and record upstream pm CLI/SDK UX issues separately in unbraind/pm-cli.
Align pm-web with pm CLI 2026.6.12 release readiness

Latest pm CLI/SDK dependency is used; pm-changelog release scripts are present where applicable; package tests and release checks pass or blockers are recorded; no private data is introduced; results are captured in pm history.

message: Create tracking item for 2026.6.12 pm package release-readiness pass

value.author: codex
value.text: Private pm-web release-readiness pass: removed GitHub CI/release workflows to avoid GitHub runners and npm publish for the private website, aligned pm CLI/pm-changelog dependencies, regenerated CHANGELOG.md, and release checks passed through typecheck/build/test/changelog. npm audit --omit=dev failed repeatedly on 2026-06-12 with registry ETIMEDOUT against npm advisory bulk endpoint; no vulnerability report was returned. Full public-safe history scan remains incomplete; current tracked-file grep found expected env variable names only, not literal credentials.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verified release readiness after moving @unbrained/pm-cli to runtime dependencies: npm release:check completed for the fleet on 2026-06-12; npm audit retries for pm-beads and pm-jira returned 0 vulnerabilities after transient advisory endpoint failures.

value.author: codex
value.text: History secret-pattern scan found env-var name references such as OLLAMA_API_KEY assignments to empty strings in historical source/dist, not literal tokens. pm-web remains private and was not approved for public history.
